voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: We used to sing this for the clean-up job coordinator at summer camp.

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: A classic that is just too much fun to deny

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: (Pulls out my resumé): Concrete shoes, cyanide, TNT, neck ties, contracts, high voltage. Very accomplished.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: classic

songs.name: You Shook Me All Night Long

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Knocking me out with those American thighs 🇺🇸

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: Slightly less sexy guitar than Aerosmith, but still sexy

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: I have great nostalgia for this song. The big bad in one my campaigns was killing the zealot barbarian's patron. I made a special battle music playlist for the climactic battle, so when the character took the mantle of the god of strength and storms this song started playing.

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: THUNDAH

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: Color me shocked to see that this did indeed come out 1990...

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: It's crazy that this was the 90s, it feels so 80s to me but I guess it was 1990, so very close. I still enjoy it though ⚡

voters.name: Ola
voters.comment: this one goes out to my bestie fistula

voters.name: Steve
voters.comment: Man, I really wanted to like this song because of the epic guitar solo at the beginning but I just can't stand the singer's voice. That's always been my problem with AC/DC but I feel like it's especially amplified in this song. He sounds like he's doing a jokey Muppet voice.

voters.name: Rose
voters.comment: Hi dad.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Great way to start the playlist!

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Fits the prompt but DIDN'T age well.

voters.name: Mike
voters.comment: Point for unconventional, even if I don't really care for the song.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: I caaaaan't
